Class DashboardDataItemLogic

java.lang.Object
de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.DashboardDataItemLogic
Direct Known Subclasses:
AcribisCurrentDischargeDiags, AcribisTimelineDischargeDiags, CumulativeAge, CumulativeGender, CumulativeLengthOfStayHospital, CumulativeLengthOfStayIcu, CumulativeMaxTreatmentLevelAge, CumulativeResult, CumulativeVariantTestResults, CumulativeZipCode, CurrentConsent, CurrentMaxTreatmentLevel, CurrentRecruitment, CurrentTreatmentLevel, CurrentZipCode, KiraCumulativeAgeDisorders, KiraCumulativeDiagsGender, KiraCurrentTreatmentLevel, KiraKjpTimelineAdmission, KiraKjpTimelineAge, KiraKjpTimelineIntensiveCare, KiraLengthOfStay, KiraPedTimelineAge, KiraPedTimelineMaxTreatmentLevel, KiraTimelineDisorders, TimelineConsent, TimelineDeath, TimelineMaxTreatmentLevel, TimelineRecruitment, TimelineTests, TimelineVariantTestResults

  • Method Details

    • getObservationsYoungerKickoffDate

      public static List<MiiObservation> getObservationsYoungerKickoffDate(DataItemContext dataItemContext, Collection<MiiObservation> ukbObservations)
      Filters observations to those strictly after the kickoff date for the given context.
      Parameters:
      dataItemContext - context which defines the kickoff date
      ukbObservations - input observations (may be empty)
      Returns:
      observations with an effectiveDateTime after the kickoff date

    • isDateInYearMonth

      protected static boolean isDateInYearMonth(LocalDate date, String yearMonthString)
      Checks whether a date falls within the specified year and month (YYYY-MM).
      Parameters:
      date - date to check
      yearMonthString - target year-month in format yyyy-MM
      Returns:
      true if date is in that year-month

    • isDateInQuarter

      protected static boolean isDateInQuarter(Date date, String yearQuarterString)
      Checks whether a date falls within the specified calendar quarter (e.g., "2020-Q4").

      Quarter mapping: Q1 → Jan–Mar, Q2 → Apr–Jun, Q3 → Jul–Sep, Q4 → Oct–Dec.

      Parameters:
      date - the date to check (non-null)
      yearQuarterString - target year-quarter in format yyyy-Qn, e.g., "2020-Q4"
      Returns:
      true if date is inside that year/quarter, otherwise false
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if yearQuarterString is not in yyyy-Qn format

    • isYearMonthInQuarter

      protected static boolean isYearMonthInQuarter(YearMonth ym, String yearQuarterString)
      Checks whether a YearMonth falls within the specified calendar quarter.
      Parameters:
      ym - the YearMonth to check
      yearQuarterString - target year-quarter in format yyyy-Qn
      Returns:
      true if ym is inside that quarter, otherwise false
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if yearQuarterString is not in yyyy-Qn format

    • isDateInYear

      protected static boolean isDateInYear(Date date, String yearString)
      Checks whether a date falls within the specified calendar year.
      Parameters:
      date - date to check
      yearString - target year in format yyyy
      Returns:
      true if date is in that year

    • convertToLocalDate

      protected static LocalDate convertToLocalDate(Date date)
      Converts a Date to a LocalDate using the system default timezone.
      Parameters:
      date - date to convert (non-null)
      Returns:
      corresponding LocalDate

    • determineKiRaChartsAllLabelByContext

      protected static String determineKiRaChartsAllLabelByContext(KidsRadarDataItemContext kidsRadarDataItemContext)
      Resolves the aggregated chart label for KidsRadar depending on the sub-context.
      Parameters:
      kidsRadarDataItemContext - KJP or PED
      Returns:
      label constant to use in charts

    • getValidPeriod

      protected static org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Period getValidPeriod(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Encounter.EncounterLocationComponent location, MiiEncounter encounter)
      Retrieves the valid period for an ICU stay. Prefers Encounter.location.period , but falls back to Encounter.getPeriod() if * Encounter.location.period is missing.

    • isDateInPeriod

      protected boolean isDateInPeriod(KidsRadarDataItemContext kidsRadarDataItemContext, Date admissionDate, String period)
      Checks whether an admission date matches the requested period granularity for the given KidsRadar item. Currently matches by month for both KJP and PED.
      Parameters:
      kidsRadarDataItemContext - KJP or PED
      admissionDate - date to check
      period - string period (e.g. yyyy-MM)
      Returns:
      true if the date matches the period per the current rules

    • inRange

      protected boolean inRange(int value, Integer lower, Integer upper)
      Checks whether a given integer value lies within a half-open/closed range whose lower and upper bounds may be null. 
      inRange(5, 3, 7)    // true  (3 <= 5 <= 7)
inRange(3, 3, 7)    // true  (inclusive lower)
inRange(7, 3, 7)    // true  (inclusive upper)
inRange(2, 3, 7)    // false (below lower)
inRange(9, 3, 7)    // false (above upper)
inRange(5, null, 7) // true  (no lower bound)
inRange(5, 3, null) // true  (no upper bound)
      Parameters:
      value - the value to test
      lower - the inclusive lower bound; null means unbounded below
      upper - the inclusive upper bound; null means unbounded above

    • resolveAgeLabel

      protected String resolveAgeLabel(CoreCaseData caseData, KidsRadarDataItemContext context)

    • flattenKjpCoreCases

      protected static Map<String, CoreCaseData> flattenKjpCoreCases(Map<String, Map<String, CoreCaseData>> coreCaseDataByGroups)
